title: About Us
description: Learn about SGIP Real Estate - your trusted partner in luxury real estate in UAE.

hero.title: Your Trusted Real Estate Partner
hero.subtitle: Boutique expertise in UAE luxury real estate since 2013, company established in 2021.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: SGIP Real Estate is a boutique real estate company founded in 2021 with a clear mission — to connect international investors with premium real estate opportunities in the United Arab Emirates.
paragraphs: SGIP Real Estate is a boutique real estate company founded in 2021 with a clear mission — to connect international investors with premium real estate opportunities in the United Arab Emirates.

The company was established by Rustam Umurzakov, who has been actively working in the UAE real estate market since 2013. Over the years, Rustam has developed deep knowledge of the Dubai property market and built strong relationships with developers, investors, and industry professionals.

As a boutique real estate firm, SGIP Real Estate focuses on a highly personalized approach. Rather than operating as a large-volume agency, we work closely with each client to understand their specific goals and investment criteria.
Today, SGIP Real Estate works with clients from different countries and nationalities, helping international buyers and investors confidently navigate the dynamic UAE real estate market.

We believe that every client has unique objectives. That is why we carefully analyze each request and identify the most suitable opportunities in the market. Our goal is simple — to secure the best possible deal and long-term value for our clients.

At SGIP Real Estate, real estate is more than just buying or selling property. We guide our clients through every stage of the investment journey — from identifying the right opportunity and evaluating market potential to completing the transaction and building a long-term property portfolio.
As the company continues to grow, we remain committed to delivering transparency, expertise, and a highly personalized service to every client we work with.
